# SHA-384 checksums for SQLite job migrations.
#
# Migrations are append-only once merged because SQLx stores checksums in
# live SQLite databases. To change an applied migration, add a new migration instead.
0001_create_tables.sql fa9f6b3e6ceab928157250b56dfd2618bcece5e3f2a7ee20751ce5a4bd26ab0270a6f1630e511068215be53d32741ce1
0002_create_watch_tables.sql 10f772c37222b4c8172d20999ed105771ad9e378fcad3e963a38b61d9f7204def467d40ffa0238cd732fbeac27a89dac
0003_add_status_checks.sql 2c3c5bcb4cbaeb7758868e85b3720ef4e6f364e94f4915890461a63d16745f35f31174f02bfc1bb66def7a9ab257081b
0004_status_created_at_index.sql 5b6f96c61d5b20dab4c7a4a013bf94cf86a4b84312c8170cb17b1fcb7b5d88ed5dd4a95fab723b91dcc9dbfefa372e8b
0005_add_attempt_metadata.sql f7ab2be67921e92d10698fc83de87ee3e7dc0b9ff1c65655b7c1b1a43596a6b415a5c8f5fcb292b7bd1bbc58fe945d6e
